sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, created_at DateTime) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_table (id, created_at) VALUES (1, toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'));
UPDATE test_table SET created_at = toDateTime(1672537600) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, created_at, toDateTime(created_at, 'UTC') AS utc_time FROM test_table;
SELECT toDateTime('2022-12-30 13:44:17') AS converted_time, toDateTime(1685457500, 'Asia/Tokyo') AS tokyo_time;
